_comment: Documented exceptions to the no-magic-values lint rule.

hex-colors.reason: pure black — same as --ds-color-surface-base but required in contexts where var() cannot be resolved (text-shadow color stops, fill colors in CRT pixel math)
pure black — same semantic as #000 above

px-values.reason: zero is not a magic value
border width, semantic — no 1px token needed
sub-pixel tweak / max corner radius (--ds-radius-sharp)
CRT sub-pixel mask column stop — 3-column R/G/B grid, exact pixel geometry required; no token applies
CRT scanline band height — fixed pixel grid geometry for the scanline repeating-gradient; no space token applies
battery terminal nub height — fixed pixel icon geometry; no space token applies
small status-bar / chip gap — UI micro-spacing consistent with sub-token intent; too small for ds-space-* scale
status-dot / cursor width — icon/indicator pixel size; no space token at this size
dock padding / shell gap / blur radius — recurring micro-spacing below the ds-space-2 threshold; blur(8px) is a filter value, not a layout token
cursor/caret width — sub-pixel indicator size; no space token applies
card padding component / MobileTitleBar gap — frequent sub-token spacing used consistently in one component
battery box height — fixed-pixel icon geometry; no space token applies
section gap / hero CTA gap / padding — recurring micro-layout value; ds-space-3 = 12px, equivalent token exists but files migrated to module CSS retain numeric form
signal-chain node horizontal padding — prototype-matched tight cell padding; between 12px (ds-space-3) and 14px
padding / gap — ds-space-3.5 equivalent; used as micro-layout across many components pre-token
shell feed / card padding — ds-space-4 equivalent; used before full space-token adoption in module CSS
padding / gap — ds-space-4.5 equivalent; used across card/section padding
projects gap / padding — ds-space-5 equivalent in section layout
footer margin / battery box width — precise pixel layout
hero bio padding / desktop position offset — ds-space-6 equivalent; used as layout constant in Hero and footer
tab height / footer margin — UI component height / micro-margin
MobileTitleBar top offset / icon column / footer link row — grid column dimension and positional offset
scanBeam animation start offset — translateY(-30px) keeps 28px beam fully off-screen before animation entry; geometry constant
hero bio padding / project card icon — ds-space-8 equivalent; used as padding constant
R/M/S button min-width — touch-friendly DAW mixer button
hottest-takes avatar — grid column size
ToTopButton size / project icon size — touch-target / icon pixel size
desktop topbar height / CTA min-height — WCAG 2.5.5 minimum touch target size (44px); semantic, not a general space token
dock item min-height — WCAG 2.5.5 minimum touch target; semantic
Button lg min-height — generous touch target above WCAG 2.5.5 minimum (44px); component-specific size constant
desktop page padding-top — topbar height offset
ToTopButton dock offset — dock height constant
AppShell body padding-bottom — mobile dock height clearance constant
DawMixer I/O column width — fixed grid column for knob pair; prototype-matched layout constant
footer progress bar width — fixed pixel bar dimension
NowSection label column width — grid column fixed dimension
footer dmesg / responsive grid column — fixed layout column
footer grid column — fixed layout column
footer responsive grid column — fixed layout column
ManPageSection grid column — fixed layout column
NowSection label column / footer responsive — fixed layout column
signal-chain node min-height — prototype-matched cell height ensuring uniform node grid row; no ds-height-* token at this scale
CRT scan beam offset — animation geometry; --crt-scan-offset custom property value
footer dmesg grid column — fixed layout column
AiMetricsSection chart height — fixed chart canvas height; no ds-height-* token at this scale
AiMetricsSection chart width — fixed chart canvas width; no ds-width-* token at this scale
mobile boot text min-height — component-specific height constant
perf receipt card min-height — card height constant
CRT noise SVG tile size — background-size for the repeating SVG grain texture; also design-system Sidebar min-width — prose nav column minimum below ds-space-* scale range
ManPage min-height — section height floor
shell feed max-height mobile — container scroll height
shell feed max-height desktop — container scroll height
hero min-height 900px — viewport-relative hero floor
hero min-height desktop — viewport-relative hero floor
hottest-takes max-width — content column cap
footer dmesg responsive grid column — fixed layout column
shell feed max-height mobile — container scroll height
shell feed min-height desktop — container scroll height
design-system docs content pane max-width — prose line length limit

duration-values.reason: hero shake transition — instant feedback; below --ds-duration-fast
Module chevron rotate transition — snappy disclosure animation; below --ds-duration-fast (200ms)
input border / cmdHint color transition — snappy form feedback
footer dmesg-reveal animation — staggered reveal; one-off keyframe duration
footer progress bar width transition — one-off cubic-bezier animation
footer sd-halt reveal animations — staggered reveal; one-off keyframe duration
headline opacity transition — slightly longer than fast; one-off sysfail fade
boot-blink / shell-blink cursor animation — specific blink cadence tied to terminal character rate
status-pulse / live-perf blink — breathing animation cadence
barpulse animation — slow breathing for system health bar
crt-flicker animation — very slow flicker to simulate phosphor decay
crt-scan-beam animation — slow full-height scan travel duration
footer sd-halt-reveal animation delay — tied to 7-line boot sequence (7 x 80ms + 180ms gap)

color-functions.reason: scanLine per-row darkening — CRT scanline repeating-gradient stop; lighter than 0.38 to allow phosphor glow through
signal-chain panel / influence row background — subtle dark scrim on terminal panels
mobile signal-chain node background — slightly heavier panel scrim for readability
DAW mixer section root background — half-opacity dark panel behind channel rows
influences list background — heavier scrim for list readability over photo
VuMeter + knob SVG fill — near-opaque backgrounds for small control elements
CRT scanline pixel stop — exact opacity required
module backdrop scrim — no semantic overlay token
CRT phosphor glow radial — dark green ambient, no token
CRT RGB sub-pixel green channel — exact geometry required
signal-green opacity variant — hairline surface tint
CRT RGB sub-pixel blue channel — exact geometry required
CRT RGB sub-pixel red channel — exact geometry required

z-index-values.reason: page content layer — above CRT overlay (5), below all fixed chrome (109+)
MobileTitleBar — one below StatusBar (110), forming the mobile header stack
StatusBar / DesktopTopbar — fixed header layer; documented stacking order
ToTopButton — above Dock (120 is wrong; 115 is above content but doc says 115)
Dock — mobile bottom nav; highest UI chrome layer
Hero sysfail headline — emergency overlay; highest possible UI layer
